rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Sfba Investment Groups Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Respondents First Amended Answer To Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Demand For Hearing; Specification Of Matters To Be Stricken
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 1. PETITIONER SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC Petitioner Sfba Investment Groups Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Respondents First Amended Answer To Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Demand For Hearing; Specification Of Matters To Be Stricken is GRANTED with leave to amend for Responded to clearly label its affirmative defenses and properly allege them per the ruling on the demurrer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Sfba Investment Groups Notice Of Hearing Of Demurrer And Specifications Of Grounds For Demurrer To Respondents First Amended Answer To Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 1. PETITIONER SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC Petitioner Sfba Investment Groups Notice Of Hearing Of Demurrer And Specifications Of Grounds For Demurrer To Respondents First Amended Answer To Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is sustained with leave to amend for respondent to allege in good faith facts in support of each affirmative defense subject to this demurrer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY C. MCFADDEN VS. MARY L. MCFADDEN, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES MCFADDEN, JOSEPH MCFADDEN, LEO MCFADDEN, KATHLEEN MCFADDEN VASQUEZ, PATRICIA MCFADDEN MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on November 13, 2020 moving party to file a supplemental brief outlining each step to be taken by that parties in order to finalize the settlement agreement. The steps must be clear and specific, e.g. (1) each set of defendants shall obtain loan proposals from 3/5/10 lenders on 1/2/5 properties by no later than December 31, 2020 in furtherance of paragraph X of the Stipulation, etc; (2) parties to agree on one of the obtained financing options by no later than January 15, 2021; if parties are not able to agree, then (3) etc. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY C. MCFADDEN VS. MARY L. MCFADDEN, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants James F Mcfadden Joseph P Mcfadden Leo Mcfadden Patricia Mcfadden Kathleen Mcfadden Vasquez Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES MCFADDEN, JOSEPH MCFADDEN, LEO MCFADDEN, KATHLEEN MCFADDEN VASQUEZ, PATRICIA MCFADDEN Notice Of Defendants James F Mcfadden Joseph P Mcfadden Leo Mcfadden Patricia Mcfadden Kathleen Mcfadden Vasquez Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed on October 13, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW EBRAHIMOON VS. GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Bgsm, Inc. Dba Keller Williams Peninsula Estates And Stanley Guan?S Motion To Strike Portions Of Golden Properties, Llc?S First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT BGSM, INC. DBA KELLER WILLIAMS PENINSULA ESTATES Notice Of Hearing Of Bgsm, Inc. Dba Keller Williams Peninsula Estates And Stanley Guan?S Motion To Strike Portions Of Golden Properties, Llc?S First Amended Cross-Complaint is granted with leave to amend for cross-complaint to allege facts supporting award of punitive damages under the sixth and eighth cause of action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW EBRAHIMOON VS. GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT BGSM, INC. DBA KELLER WILLIAMS PENINSULA ESTATES DEMURRER to 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for cross-complainants to allege facts connecting alleged wrongful scheme to the alleged damages; allege fraud with particularity and allege facts re: joint tortfeasors. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2440 BLDG LLC VS. RASHAAN EVERETT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 8. PLAINTIFF 2440 BLDG LLC Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment Hearing Required to address the total amount of attachment on all three applications and authority for attachment in excess of obligations under the contract as shown in each application. Furthermore, based on the Proofs of Service on file Plaintiff may seek default and default judgment at this time for the amounts sought in this action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUTRO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., VS. STILYNGER OLIVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case From Unlimited To Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 12. DEFENDANT STILYNGER OLIVARES, MARIA MARIN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case From Unlimited To Limited Jurisdiction is DENIED. The Court notes that Maria Marin failed to pay fees; the fees shall be promptly paid in accordance with the Orders Denying Fee Waiver/Reconsideration. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUTRO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., VS. STILYNGER OLIVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2020 line 12. DEFENDANT STILYNGER OLIVARES, MARIA MARIN DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states facts to support an unlawful detainer action based on nuisance. The Court notes that Maria Marin failed to pay fees; the fees shall be promptly paid in accordance with the Orders Denying Fee Waiver/Reconsideration. = (501/CFH)
